Bradford County

FHA loans in Bradford County, Florida

Buying a home in Bradford County — in North Central Florida, with Starke as the county seat — is more attainable with an FHA loan. With as little as 3.5% down and credit scores starting at 580, FHA financing helps buyers across Starke and Lawtey get into a home without a large down payment.

Bradford County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

$541,287 is the 2026 Florida FHA floor that applies to most counties, including Bradford County. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Bradford County's exact 2026 figure with HUD's official lookup before making an offer. In floor counties the 2026 multi-unit limits are $693,050 (2-unit), $837,700 (3-unit), and $1,041,125 (4-unit).

Why FHA loans work in Bradford County

FHA loans are popular across North Central Florida because they lower the two biggest hurdles to buying: the down payment and credit requirements. In Bradford County, that means first-time buyers and growing families in Starke and Lawtey can finance a home with just 3.5% down, use gift funds, and pair FHA with Florida down payment assistance.

Areas we serve in Bradford County

We help home buyers and homeowners throughout Bradford County, including Starke and Lawtey. Wherever you're looking, we'll help you understand your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Bradford County for 2026?+
The 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287 applies to most counties, including Bradford County. Confirm the exact current figure for Bradford County with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup.
How much down payment do I need for an FHA loan in Bradford County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ credit score. Down payment funds can come from savings or a gift from family, and may be paired with Florida down payment assistance.
Do you offer FHA loans throughout Bradford County?+
Yes. We serve buyers and homeowners across Bradford County, including Starke and Lawtey, with FHA purchases, refinances, and pre-approvals.
